subject: nng reps out of office on dec 13, 14 and 17

emails.subject: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17
emails.subject_base: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17
emails.body: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17 The following people will be out of the office on Dec 13, 14 and 17th: Dec 13 South Central: Debra Joe North Diana, James, Jerry, Nancy, Randy Dec 14 South Central: Debra, Joe North: Diana, James, Jerry, Kathy Dec 17 South Central: Janet, Robert, Sherry North: Karen, Nancy, Jean, Kathy Larry

emails.subject: RE: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17
emails.subject_base: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17
emails.body: RE: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17 Larry, who would be two consistent people on each team to cover, Thursday, Friday, Monday and Tuesday? Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn; Zadow, Raetta

emails.subject: RE: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17
emails.subject_base: NNG Reps out of office on Dec 13, 14 and 17
emails.body: Lynn, We can talk about this tomorrow morning, but I feel Jean Adams Kathy Sturr for South Central, and Pat Barry Renee for the North. Larry To: Berger, Larry
